headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — ideal day to make real progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), which aligns directly to the Evals key deliverable on the Agents Big Rock.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so dashboards are available for next check-in
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance the design doc for AE-1079 (Generated evaluations — no ground truth)
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, no due date set yet which means it could slip silently; evals is a key 26.4+ deliverable on the Agents Big Rock and directly feeds the Evals adoption OKR

must_communicate_with.about: Align on technical approach for generated evals without ground truth — get their input before finalizing design doc
Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues blocking access to escalation data and product metrics

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore visibility

evals_adoption.vs_goal: AE-1079 design doc is a prerequisite to expanding evals without ground truth

flags: Salesforce auth is broken (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into open escalations or high-priority customer cases. Could miss SLA-critical issues.
Snowflake credentials are empty — product metrics dashboard is inaccessible; March data noted as needing update in Big Rock page.
AE-1079 has no due date — recommend setting one to create accountability and signal priority to stakeholders.
Autopilot flagged as Risk Yellow in Big Rock — monitor for any incoming asks from Dragos/Stefan that could pull your focus.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations resolved or decisions recorded today yet — primary value opportunity is unblocking the evals design doc which gates a key 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics unavailable due to broken Snowflake connection; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the most impactful adoption-driving work available today.

slack_summary: Clear calendar and zero inbound — best day to deep-focus on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), which is your only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 Agents deliverable. Top urgent item: fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials — both are broken, leaving you blind on escalations and product metrics. No meetings today.
